MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-23-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ARENDT DE JOUNGE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
